svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/28.0.6 Chrome/138.0.7204.100 Electron/37.2.3 Safari/537.36" version="28.0.6"> <diagram id="otel-fig3" name="図3 経路Bの集約・加工構成"> <mxGraphModel dx="-554" dy="-202" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1040" pageHeight="560" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="a1" value="アプリ1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontSize=12;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="100" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a2" value="アプリ2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontSize=12;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="240" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="a3" value="アプリ3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontSize=12;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="380" width="140" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="col" value="OpenTelemetry Collector
(CloudWatch Agent / ADOT / 標準)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="360" y="120" width="260" height="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pipe" value="receivers → processors
(batch / サンプリング)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontSize=11;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="385" y="180" width="210" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="auth" value="sigv4auth extension" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#000000;fontSize=11;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="385" y="280" width="210" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cw" value="Amazon CloudWatch（OTLP エンドポイント / SigV4）" style="points=[[0,0],[0.25,0],[0.5,0],[0.75,0],[1,0],[1,0.25],[1,0.5],[1,0.75],[1,1],[0.75,1],[0.5,1],[0.25,1],[0,1],[0,0.75],[0,0.5],[0,0.25]];outlineConnect=0;gradientColor=none;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;container=1;pointerEvents=0;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;shape=mxgraph.aws4.group;grIcon=mxgraph.aws4.group_aws_cloud_alt;strokeColor=#000000;fillColor=none;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=30;fontColor=#000000;dashed=0;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="780" y="100" width="240" height="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xray" value="xray
/v1/traces" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#000000;gradientColor=#4D72F3;gradientDirection=north;fillColor=#3334B9;strokeColor=#ffffff;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=11;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;shape=mxgraph.aws4.resourceIcon;resIcon=mxgraph.aws4.x_ray;" parent="cw" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="90" y="50" width="48" height="48" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="logs" value="logs
/v1/logs" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#000000;gradientColor=#F34482;gradientDirection=north;fillColor=#BC1356;strokeColor=#ffffff;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=11;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;shape=mxgraph.aws4.resourceIcon;resIcon=mxgraph.aws4.cloudwatch;" parent="cw" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="90" y="150" width="48" height="48" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mon" value="monitoring
/v1/metrics
(プレビュー)" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#000000;gradientColor=#F34482;gradientDirection=north;fillColor=#BC1356;strokeColor=#ffffff;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=11;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;shape=mxgraph.aws4.resourceIcon;resIcon=mxgraph.aws4.cloudwatch;" parent="cw" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="90" y="260" width="48" height="48" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;" parent="1" source="a1" target="col" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;" parent="1" source="a2" target="col" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;" parent="1" source="a3" target="col" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" value="SigV4 / 1本に集約" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;fontSize=11;" parent="1" source="col" target="cw" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
